stemHtml: How do you get out of a spin?

options.a: Full power, Ailerons opposite, Rudder neutral, Pull yoke
options.b: Full power, Ailerons neutral, Full Rudder opposite, Pull yoke
options.c: Power Idle, Ailerons opposite, Rudder neutral, Push yoke
options.d: Power Idle, Ailerons neutral, Rudder opposite, Push yoke
